texto: You have to recognize your inability to love before you can love the way God loves. His version of love is unfamiliar to the natural world
autor: It is sacrificial and selfless and the most beautiful love you could experience.
explicacao: Orientação direta de It is sacrificial and selfless and the most beautiful love you could experience. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “You have to recognize your inability to love before you can love the way God loves. His version o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, shannon-l-alder, recognize, útil em momentos de reflexao.
